hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 95 条：AI 30 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】美联储主席沃什在央行任命首批员工，其中包括《Project 2025》作者；【FINANCE】格雷格·阿贝尔刚刚完成了他作为伯克希尔首席执行官的第一笔大交易。为什么沃伦·巴菲特很高兴；【WORLD】真主党拒绝以色列和黎巴嫩同意重新停火。

items.title: Fed Chair Warsh makes first hires at central bank, including 'Project 2025' author
items.summary: The new Fed chair has made his first hires. One wrote the Fed chapter in the conservative policy blueprint "Project 2025."
items.title_zh: 美联储主席沃什在央行任命首批员工，其中包括《Project 2025》作者
items.summary_zh: 新任美联储主席已经任命了他的第一批人选。其中一人在保守派政策蓝图“2025 年计划”中撰写了美联储章节。

items.title: Greg Abel just made his first big deal as Berkshire CEO. Why Warren Buffett is happy
items.summary: Berkshire's purchase of homebuilder Taylor Morrison gives the conglomerate a larger foothold in housing and appears to have been struck at a bargain valuation.
items.title_zh: 格雷格·阿贝尔刚刚完成了他作为伯克希尔首席执行官的第一笔大交易。为什么沃伦·巴菲特很高兴
items.summary_zh: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司收购房屋建筑商泰勒·莫里森(Taylor Morrison)，使该集团在房地产领域获得了更大的立足点，而且估值似乎很便宜。

items.title: Hezbollah rejects renewed ceasefire agreed by Israel and Lebanon
items.summary: The United States announced the ceasefire agreement on Wednesday night following a fresh round of talks.
items.title_zh: 真主党拒绝以色列和黎巴嫩同意重新停火
items.summary_zh: 经过新一轮谈判后，美国于周三晚上宣布停火协议。

items.title: Amid War, Iran’s Soccer Leader Works to Get His Team to the World Cup
items.summary: Mehdi Taj said his federation has been dealing with FIFA, not the United States, in trying to obtain visas for Iran to play in the tournament that begins next week.
items.title_zh: 在战争中，伊朗足球领袖努力让他的球队进入世界杯
items.summary_zh: 迈赫迪·泰吉表示，他的足协一直在与国际足联（而不是美国）打交道，试图为伊朗获得参加下周开始的世界杯的签证。

items.title: How Endava is redesigning software delivery around AI agents
items.summary: Learn how Endava is using AI agents, ChatGPT Enterprise, and Codex to accelerate software delivery, automate workflows, and build an AI-native culture across the enterprise.
items.title_zh: Endava 如何围绕人工智能代理重新设计软件交付
items.summary_zh: 了解 Endava 如何使用 AI 代理、ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 来加速软件交付、自动化工作流程并在整个企业中构建 AI 原生文化。

items.title: Bitcoin and ether ETFs end record multi-billion outflow streak
items.summary: U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs pulled $3.05 million in net inflows on Wednesday after 13 straight sessions of redemptions totaling roughly $4.4 billion, while ether ETFs ended a 17-day outflow streak with $19.30 million led entirely by BlackRock's ETHA.
items.title_zh: 比特币和以太坊 ETF 结束创纪录的数十亿美元资金外流
items.summary_zh: 美国现货比特币 ETF 在连续 13 个交易日赎回后，周三净流入 305 万美元，赎回总额约为 44 亿美元，而以太坊 ETF 结束了连续 17 天的流出，净流入 1,930 万美元，完全由贝莱德 (BlackRock) 的 ETHA 领衔。

items.title: 'Dr. Doom'-backed Atlas Capital CEO says bitcoin could crash 70% before reaching $500,000
items.summary: Backed by economist Nouriel Roubini, a long-time anti-bitcoin advocate, and known as 'Dr. Doom,' the Atlas CEO, Reza Bundy, shot a short-term warning for bitcoin but stayed bullish in the long-term.
items.title_zh: '博士。 Doom 支持的 Atlas Capital 首席执行官表示，比特币在达到 50 万美元之前可能会暴跌 70%
items.summary_zh: 得到了长期反比特币倡导者、被称为“比特币博士”的经济学家努里尔·鲁比尼 (Nouriel Roubini) 的支持。 Atlas首席执行官Reza Bundy对比特币发出了短期警告，但长期看好比特币。

items.title: Morgan Stanley will soon open its trillion-dollar wealth management funnel to AI agents
items.summary: Morgan Stanley's move is one of the earliest instances of a major Wall Street bank opening its platforms to external AI tools.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利即将向人工智能代理开放万亿美元财富管理渠道
items.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利的举动是华尔街主要银行向外部人工智能工具开放其平台的最早实例之一。

items.title: Zelensky proposes face-to-face talks in open letter to Putin
items.summary: Ukraine's president tells the Russian leader that only "direct engagement" between the two countries could end the war, with the US focused on Iran.
items.title_zh: 泽连斯基在给普京的公开信中提议进行面对面会谈
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰总统告诉俄罗斯领导人，只有两国之间的“直接接触”才能结束战争，而美国的重点是伊朗。

items.title: Backed by Trump, Opposed by Putin, and Fighting for His Political Life
items.summary: Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan of Armenia is seeking re-election as his country weighs questions of war and peace, of autocracy and democracy, and of subjugation and independence.
items.title_zh: 特朗普支持，普京反对，为自己的政治生命而奋斗
items.summary_zh: 亚美尼亚总理尼科尔·帕希尼扬正在寻求连任，因为该国正在权衡战争与和平、独裁与民主、征服与独立等问题。

items.title: Russia Rails Against the West but Welcomes Candace Owens and Andrew Tate
items.summary: While some powerful Russians shun the West, others want to restore ties and embrace friendly Westerners. President Vladimir V. Putin’s annual economic conference illustrates the conflicting impulses.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯反对西方但欢迎坎迪斯·欧文斯和安德鲁·泰特
items.summary_zh: 虽然一些强大的俄罗斯人回避西方，但其他人则希望恢复关系并拥抱友好的西方人。弗拉基米尔·V·普京总统的年度经济会议说明了相互矛盾的冲动。

items.title: Hezbollah’s Fiber-Optic Drones Expose Cracks in Israeli Defenses
items.summary: The Lebanese militant group’s attacks have caught Israelis off guard, forcing its political and military leaders to scramble for solutions.
items.title_zh: 真主党的光纤无人机暴露了以色列防御的漏洞
items.summary_zh: 黎巴嫩激进组织的袭击让以色列人措手不及，迫使其政治和军事领导人忙于寻求解决方案。

items.title: JPMorgan, Bank of America, Citi to start blockchain offensive with shared tokenized network
items.summary: American's biggest banks plan to introduce a shared tokenized network next year to tackle the potential threat of stablecoins eating into their deposits.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通、美国银行、花旗将通过共享代币化网络发起区块链攻势
items.summary_zh: 美国最大的银行计划明年推出共享代币化网络，以应对稳定币侵​​蚀其存款的潜在威胁。

items.title: Crypto Clarity Act in spotlight for bad-actor provisions as Senate process grinds forward
items.summary: The industry has been trying to make a case this week the Clarity Act provides law enforcement strong tools to combat illicit finance involving cryptocurrency.
items.title_zh: 随着参议院进程的推进，《加密货币清晰度法案》因不良行为条款而受到关注
items.summary_zh: 该行业本周一直试图证明《澄清法案》为执法部门打击涉及加密货币的非法金融提供了强有力的工具。

items.title: What Is an XRP ETF? A Complete Guide to XRP Exchange-Traded Funds
items.summary: An XRP ETF is an exchange-traded fund that tracks the price of XRP. These funds trade on regulated stock exchanges such as the New York Stock Exchange or Nasdaq. Instead of buying XRP on a crypto exchange and holding it in a digital wallet, investors purchase ETF shares through a
items.title_zh: 什么是 XRP ETF？ XRP 交易所交易基金完整指南
items.summary_zh: XRP ETF 是一种跟踪 XRP 价格的交易所交易基金。这些基金在纽约证券交易所或纳斯达克等受监管的证券交易所进行交易。投资者不是在加密货币交易所购买 XRP 并将其保存在数字钱包中，而是通过

items.title: Senate Republicans urged financial regulators to rework bank capital rules for digital assets
items.summary: A group of Senate Republicans is pressing key financial regulatory agencies to clarify capital standards for digital assets.
items.title_zh: 参议院共和党人敦促金融监管机构修改数字资产的银行资本规则
items.summary_zh: 一群参议院共和党人正在敦促主要金融监管机构澄清数字资产的资本标准。

items.title: A blueprint for democratic governance of frontier AI
items.summary: OpenAI outlines a blueprint for U.S. governance of frontier AI, proposing a federal framework for safety, resilience, and national security.
items.title_zh: 前沿人工智能民主治理蓝图
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 勾勒出美国前沿人工智能治理的蓝图，提出了安全、弹性和国家安全的联邦框架。

items.title: Teaching AI agents to ask better questions by playing “Battleship”
items.summary: MIT researchers use the classic game as a test bed for AI agents, finding a small AI model can outperform the biggest ones at 1 percent of the cost.
items.title_zh: 通过玩“战舰”来教人工智能代理提出更好的问题
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员使用这款经典游戏作为 AI 代理的测试平台，发现小型 AI 模型可以以 1% 的成本超越最大的模型。

items.title: MIT researchers teach AI models to interpret charts
items.summary: The new ChartNet training dataset could improve the accuracy of vision-language models that help analyze business trends or interpret scientific figures.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员教人工智能模型解释图表
items.summary_zh: 新的 ChartNet 训练数据集可以提高视觉语言模型的准确性，帮助分析业务趋势或解释科学数据。

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Bitcoin set to slump to new lows for 2026 after recent sell-off, traders forecast
items.summary: The cryptocurrency is likely to break below its lows hit in early February, traders on prediction market Kalshi believe.
items.title_zh: 交易员预测，在最近的抛售之后，比特币将在 2026 年跌至新低
items.summary_zh: 预测市场 Kalshi 的交易员认为，加密货币可能会跌破 2 月初触及的低点。

items.title: Here's what could happen if bitcoin breaks below $60,000
items.summary: A confluence of factors makes $60,000 as key level to watch for in the near term, according to Deribit.
items.title_zh: 如果比特币跌破 60,000 美元，可能会发生以下情况
items.summary_zh: Deribit 表示，多种因素的综合作用使得 60,000 美元成为近期值得关注的关键水平。

items.title: Bitcoin in danger of dropping to $60,000, with Zcash bulls turning their backs on ZEC
items.summary: AI bets are recording rapid profit-taking as Broadcom as outlook for AI-chip sales fell short of high expectations, driving down crypto markets.
items.title_zh: Zcash 多头放弃 ZEC，比特币面临跌至 60,000 美元的危险
items.summary_zh: 由于人工智能芯片销售前景未达到高预期，导致加密货币市场下跌，博通的人工智能押注正在迅速获利回吐。

items.title: Bitcoin plunges to near $62,000 as the AI trade unwinds, HYPE falls 14%
items.summary: Broadcom's disappointing AI chip outlook pulled the Nasdaq lower for a third session, dragged Asian equities down with it, and took crypto along for the ride.
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能交易的平息，比特币暴跌至 62,000 美元附近，HYPE 下跌 14%
items.summary_zh: 博通令人失望的人工智能芯片前景导致纳斯达克指数连续第三个交易日走低，亚洲股市也随之下跌，加密货币也随之下跌。

items.title: Security researcher finds Zcash vulnerability allowing ‘unlimited’ counterfeit minting; ZEC drops 31%
items.summary: The vulnerability was fixed within days, and findings suggest that actual exploitation of the bug is unlikely.
items.title_zh: 安全研究人员发现 Zcash 漏洞允许“无限”伪造铸币； ZEC 下跌 31%
items.summary_zh: 该漏洞在几天内得到修复，调查结果表明该漏洞不太可能被实际利用。

items.title: JPMorgan, Citi-backed consortium plans to launch tokenized deposit network in early 2027: WSJ
items.summary: The initiative would enable tokenized deposits to move instantly and support around-the-clock settlement, the Wall Street Journal reported.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通和花旗支持的财团计划于 2027 年初推出代币化存款网络：《华尔街日报》
items.summary_zh: 据《华尔街日报》报道，该举措将使代币化存款能够即时转移并支持全天候结算。

items.title: Chainalysis says ‘top-tier’ gray market peptide vendors turn to bitcoin and stablecoins
items.summary: “To scale, the gray-market peptide trade adopted cryptocurrency as its backbone,” Chainalysis said in a report.
items.title_zh: Chainaanalysis 称“顶级”灰市肽供应商转向比特币和稳定币
items.summary_zh: Chainaanalysis 在一份报告中表示：“为了扩大规模，灰市肽交易采用了加密货币作为其支柱。”

items.title: Introducing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind
items.summary: GPT-Rosalind advances life sciences research with enhanced biological reasoning, medicinal chemistry expertise, genomics analysis, and experimental workflow capabilities.
items.title_zh: 向 GPT-Rosalind 引入新功能
items.summary_zh: GPT-Rosalind 通过增强的生物推理、药物化学专业知识、基因组学分析和实验工作流程功能推进生命科学研究。

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: We've been busy! Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 我们一直很忙！以下是 I/O 2026 上最重要的公告、发布和演示的摘要。

items.title: NSF renews support for MIT-led AI and physics institute, expanding a new model for discovery
items.summary: IAIFI enters its second phase with increased funding, broader ambitions, and a growing community at the frontier of AI and fundamental physics.
items.title_zh: NSF 继续支持麻省理工学院领导的人工智能和物理研究所，拓展新的发现模式
items.summary_zh: IAIFI 进入第二阶段，资金增加、雄心勃勃，人工智能和基础物理学前沿社区不断壮大。

items.title: Building AI models that understand chemical principles
items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.
items.title_zh: 构建理解化学原理的人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: China poaches more AI talent from the U.S. as it eyes the next 'super-app'
items.summary: Tencent Chief AI Scientist Yao Shunyu, who joined the company from OpenAI, said Friday he aims to pursue artificial general intelligence.
items.title_zh: 中国从美国挖走更多人工智能人才，着眼下一个“超级应用”
items.summary_zh: 从 OpenAI 加入腾讯的首席人工智能科学家姚舜宇周五表示，他的目标是追求通用人工智能。

items.title: Kalshi is building a prediction markets 'Bloomberg Terminal' for high-end traders, source says
items.summary: The prediction market platform is developing the platform to create a singular platform for its highly engaged traders.
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，Kalshi 正在为高端交易者建立预测市场“彭博终端”
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台正在开发该平台，为其高度参与的交易者创建一个单一的平台。

items.title: Traders say Karen Bass and Spencer Pratt will advance to runoff in high-profile LA mayoral race
items.summary: Los Angeles voters go to the polls Tuesday. If no candidate receives more than 50%, the top-two vote getters will advance to a November runoff.
items.title_zh: 交易员称凯伦·巴斯和斯宾塞·普拉特将在备受瞩目的洛杉矶市长竞选中晋级决选
items.summary_zh: 洛杉矶选民周二前往投票站。如果没有候选人获得超过 50% 的支持，得票最多的两名候选人将进入 11 月的决选。

items.title: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon says markets are in 'greed' mode as AI companies seek billions
items.summary: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon's comments come as investors prepare for what will be one of the busiest periods for equity issuance in years.
items.title_zh: 高盛首席执行官大卫·所罗门表示，随着人工智能公司寻求数十亿美元的投资，市场处于“贪婪”模式
items.summary_zh: 高盛首席执行官大卫·所罗门发表此番言论之际，投资者正在为多年来股票发行最繁忙的时期之一做准备。

items.title: Polymarket closes its first block trade as prediction markets push for Wall Street adoption
items.summary: Prediction market platforms have increasingly looked to institutional traders, not individual ones, as the next venue for growth.
items.title_zh: 随着预测市场推动华尔街采用，Polymarket 完成首笔大宗交易
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台越来越多地将机构交易者而非个人交易者视为下一个增长场所。

items.title: Individual traders drove Kalshi’s rise. Now, it’s going for Wall Street
items.summary: In a series of moves in 2026, the prediction market platform in the U.S. is working to make its event contracts more attractive to institutional trading.
items.title_zh: 个体交易员推动了卡尔希的上涨。现在，它正走向华尔街
items.summary_zh: 在 2026 年的一系列举措中，美国预测市场平台正在努力使其事件合约对机构交易更具吸引力。

items.title: How Trump's White House ballroom plan has doubled in size and cost over a year
items.summary: BBC Verify examines how the biggest change to the White House in decades has transformed in the last year.
items.title_zh: 特朗普的白宫宴会厅计划如何在一年多的时间里规模和成本翻倍
items.summary_zh: BBC verify 调查了白宫在过去一年中发生的数十年来最大的变化。

items.title: Ex-wife of Dubai ruler's nephew in custody, prosecutors say
items.summary: Zeynab Javadli had not been in contact with any of her friends since Tuesday.
items.title_zh: 检察官称迪拜统治者侄子的前妻被拘留
items.summary_zh: 自周二以来，泽纳布·贾瓦德利 (Zeynab Javadli) 就没有与她的任何朋友联系。

items.title: Mangrove forests are healing after decades of human destruction
items.summary: Swampy mangrove forests are staging a surprise comeback - which is good news for coastal communities and the climate.
items.title_zh: 经过数十年的人类破坏后，红树林正在恢复
items.summary_zh: 沼泽红树林正在出人意料地卷土重来——这对沿海社区和气候来说是个好消息。

items.title: Xi Jinping to meet Kim Jong Un in rare visit to North Korea
items.summary: It is taking place weeks after Xi met the leaders of the US and Russia - two countries that loom large over North Korea's foreign policy.
items.title_zh: 习近平罕见访问朝鲜会见金正恩
items.summary_zh: 几周前，习近平会见了美国和俄罗斯这两个对朝鲜外交政策至关重要的国家。

items.title: Trump hits back at 'unpatriotic' vote after House rebukes him over Iran
items.summary: The lower chamber of Congress passed a measure that seeks to halt further military action, in a vote seen as largely symbolic.
items.title_zh: 众议院就伊朗问题斥责特朗普后，特朗普回击“不爱国”投票
items.summary_zh: 国会下议院通过了一项旨在停止进一步军事行动的措施，此次投票在很大程度上被视为象征性的。

items.title: US plans to fight flesh-eating screwworm outbreak with flies and dogs
items.summary: The insect, which has been found in America for the first time since 1966, is a growing concern in the southern US.
items.title_zh: 美国计划用苍蝇和狗来对抗食肉螺旋虫疫情
items.summary_zh: 这种昆虫自 1966 年首次在美国发现以来，在美国南部引起了越来越多的关注。

items.title: Dutch police investigate suspected drugging and sexual assault of multiple women
items.summary: Police raided the suspects' homes after tip-offs from German and UK authorities.
items.title_zh: 荷兰警方调查多名女性涉嫌吸毒和性侵事件
items.summary_zh: 在接到德国和英国当局的举报后，警方突击搜查了嫌疑人的家。

items.title: Oscar-nominated Persepolis author Marjane Satrapi dies aged 56
items.summary: The French-Iranian author and illustrator was known for her graphic novel series and Oscar-nominated film.
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡提名波斯波利斯作家玛嘉·莎塔碧去世，享年 56 岁
items.summary_zh: 这位法裔伊朗作家和插画家以其图画小说系列和奥斯卡提名电影而闻名。

items.title: How Gold Is Driving the Spread of Ebola
items.summary: Mining has been the lifeblood of this remote Congolese hill town for decades. Now, it is fueling the spread of a devastating outbreak.
items.title_zh: 黄金如何推动埃博拉病毒的传播
items.summary_zh: 几十年来，采矿业一直是这个偏远的刚果山城的命脉。现在，它正在助长毁灭性疫情的蔓延。

items.title: On Patrol With Tokyo’s New Litter Police
items.summary: Visitor numbers to Shibuya are surging and trash cans are scarce. Enter the city patrol.
items.title_zh: 与东京新垃圾警察一起巡逻
items.summary_zh: 涩谷的游客数量激增，垃圾桶却稀缺。进入城市巡逻队。

items.title: The Priests Revered in the Land of Five Genders
items.summary: The bissus of South Sulawesi are considered a link between the earthly and celestial because they are thought to embody both male and female traits.
items.title_zh: 五性别之地受人尊敬的祭司
items.summary_zh: 南苏拉威西岛的比苏斯被认为是尘世与天界之间的纽带，因为它们被认为同时体现了男性和女性的特征。

items.title: Russia Floods Armenia With Disinformation Ahead of Election
items.summary: Fearing a loss of influence, groups linked to the Kremlin and intelligence agencies have sought to discredit the country’s prime minister.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯在选举前向亚美尼亚散播虚假信息
items.summary_zh: 由于担心失去影响力，与克里姆林宫和情报机构有联系的团体试图抹黑该国总理。

items.title: What To Know as China’s Xi Jinping Heads to North Korea
items.summary: As Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang, he faces an emboldened North Korean dictator, whose alliance with Russia has reduced his dependence on China.
items.title_zh: 中国习近平前往朝鲜时需要了解什么
items.summary_zh: 当习近平访问平壤时，他面对的是一位胆大妄为的朝鲜独裁者，他与俄罗斯的联盟减少了他对中国的依赖。

items.title: Ireland, Seen as a Weak Link in Europe’s Defense, Is Trying to Bulk Up
items.summary: As concern rises in Europe over threats from an emboldened Russia, the Irish government says it’s working to plug gaps in its military, which reflect a tradition of neutrality.

items.title: Zcash plummets 30% as Shielded Labs reveals a major bug that went undetected for four years
items.summary: Shielded Labs revealed that the bug could have helped an attacker print unlimited counterfeit tokens. That could have damaged trust in the token's supply and its value.
items.title_zh: Shielded Labs 披露了四年来未被发现的重大错误，Zcash 暴跌 30%
items.summary_zh: Shielded Labs 透露，该漏洞可能帮助攻击者打印无限量的伪造代币。这可能会损害人们对代币供应及其价值的信任。

items.title: OCC chief says Democrats applying sole political pressure in World Liberty charter choice
items.summary: The regulator rejected claims he's doing President Trump's bidding during a congressional hearing that also addressed the GENIUS Act stablecoin push.
items.title_zh: OCC 负责人表示，民主党在世界自由宪章选择中施加了唯一的政治压力
items.summary_zh: 该监管机构否认了他在国会听证会上执行特朗普总统命令的说法，该听证会还讨论了《天才法案》稳定币的推动问题。

items.title: Hyperliquid pulls back from record highs as Arthur Hayes exits position shy of $150 price target
items.summary: The crypto veteran blamed macro risks and AI mania for taking profits, drawing backlash from traders for selling well below his recent bullish forecasts.
items.title_zh: 随着 Arthur Hayes 退出低于 150 美元目标价，Hyperliquid 从历史高位回落

items.title: South Korean police investigate local Polymarket users on illegal gambling charges: report
items.summary: South Korean Polymarket users could be subject to a fine of up to 10 million Korean won, which is worth around $6,495.
items.title_zh: 韩国警方调查当地 Polymarket 用户的非法赌博指控：报告
items.summary_zh: 韩国 Polymarket 用户可能会被处以最高 1000 万韩元（约合 6,495 美元）的罚款。

items.title: White House crypto adviser Witt defends Clarity Act, calls it ‘pro-law enforcement’ as lawmakers race to pass bill
items.summary: The White House's top cryptocurrency adviser, Patrick Witt, called the Clarity Act a "pro-enforcement bill," despite pushback.
items.title_zh: 白宫加密货币顾问维特捍卫《清晰法案》，称其为“支持执法”，因为立法者竞相通过该法案
items.summary_zh: 白宫首席加密货币顾问帕特里克·威特 (Patrick Witt) 称《澄清法案》是一项“支持执行的法案”，尽管遭到了抵制。

items.title: Ether.fi allocates $100 million to a Plume RWA vault, giving users access to yield
items.summary: The allocation comes from a mix of ether.fi's liquidity provider base and managed capital from its existing liquid vaults.
items.title_zh: Ether.fi 向 Plume RWA 金库分配 1 亿美元，让用户能够获得收益
items.summary_zh: 该分配来自 ether.fi 的流动性提供者基础和现有流动性金库的管理资本。

items.title: JPMorgan says crypto bill may have only a narrow window for passage this year
items.summary: JPMorgan analysts said the crypto market structure bill, or Clarity Act, may have only a narrow window for passage this year.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，加密货币法案今年可能只有很窄的通过窗口
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通分析师表示，加密货币市场结构法案（即清晰法案）今年可能只有很短的通过时间。

items.title: Travala unveils agentic AI travel protocol with gasless USDC payments on Base
items.summary: Travala introduced an agentic AI travel protocol on Base supporting gasless USDC hotel bookings and AI-assisted payment execution.

items.summary_zh: Travala 在 Base 上引入了代理 AI 旅行协议，支持无 Gas USDC 酒店预订和 AI 辅助支付执行。

items.title: Dreaming: Better memory for a more helpful ChatGPT
items.summary: ChatGPT introduces a new memory system to better remember preferences, keeping context fresh and relevant across conversations.
items.title_zh: 梦想：更好的记忆力，更有用的 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 引入了新的记忆系统，可以更好地记住偏好，使对话中的上下文保持新鲜和相关。

items.title_zh: 智能时代的生物防御
items.summary_zh: 人工智能驱动的生物复原力行动计划

items.title: How Wasmer used Codex to build a Node.js runtime for the edge
items.summary: See how Wasmer used Codex with GPT-5.5 to build a Node.js runtime for the edge, accelerating development 10x to 20x and shipping in weeks instead of months.

items.title: OpenAI public policy agenda
items.summary: OpenAI outlines its public policy agenda for AI, including safety, youth protection, workforce transition, and global standards to ensure AI benefits society.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 公共政策议程

items.title: Travelers deploys AI-powered claims countrywide with OpenAI
items.summary: Travelers built an AI-powered Claim Assistant with OpenAI to guide customers through filing claims, provide 24/7 support, and scale operations during peak demand.
items.title_zh: Travelers 通过 OpenAI 在全国范围内部署人工智能支持的索赔

items.title: Codex for every role, tool, and workflow
items.summary: Discover new Codex plugins, sites, and annotations that help analysts, marketers, designers, investors, and other teams get more done with AI.
items.title_zh: 适用于每个角色、工具和工作流程的 Codex

items.title: Advancing youth safety and opportunity through global leadership
items.summary: OpenAI calls for global action on youth AI safety, proposing an international institute to strengthen safeguards, standards, and opportunities for young people.
